content: Confirm domains affected and boundaries respected: proposal-2/3 are root-level Colony governance docs (CLAUDE.md new, AGENTS.md diff), ceo-owned by the same precedent as EC-010's cycle. No other domain's scope touched.

Verify trail ceo/4cf2171d's staged content still matches what's about to be applied (EC-VERIFY-FIRST-001) -- re-read proposal-2-claude-md.md and proposal-3-startup-protocol.md before writing anything live.
Write CLAUDE.md at repo root verbatim from proposal-2's drafted content.
Apply the Startup Protocol section to AGENTS.md per proposal-3, additive only -- do not alter any existing AGENTS.md section.
Explicitly do NOT touch anything related to proposal-1 (.clinerules) -- it stays unresolved pending explicit human confirmation, not silently approved by this cycle's bare invocation.
Re-read both files after write, git status confirms scope, commit + push as the human-authorized TYPE1 action.
